models.name: Low-Poly Traffic Lights
models.author: LimanOff
models.detail: Vertical signal head with three hooded lights (red/yellow/green), minimal pole mount. Clean low-poly geometry, suitable for Smashy Road style.

models.name: Low Poly & Game Ready Traffic Light
models.author: YourLocalJavaCarDealer
models.detail: Game-ready traffic light with realistic proportions. Suitable for scenes balancing realism with low-poly style.

models.name: low poly Europe Traffic Light
models.author: matsimus
models.detail: European-style traffic light (vertical configuration), 486 vertices. Includes emissive material for glowing lights when rendered.

models.name: Quaternius Downtown City MegaKit
models.author: Quaternius
models.detail: 300+ modular city environment pieces. Likely includes traffic signal elements with mast arms and hooded heads. Full Boston/NYC style city kit.

models.name: Electrical Powerline Pole (Free Asset)
models.author: tiedtke
models.detail: Wooden pole with crossarm and wire mount points. Fully textured, compatible with array/spline modifiers for line repetition. Low poly, Nanite-compatible in UE5.

models.name: Low Poly - Power Pole
models.author: tadeus
models.detail: Minimalist power pole suitable for low-poly games. Simple geometry for array-friendly repetition.

models.name: Wooden Utility Pole
models.author: Ashc0re
models.detail: Wooden utility pole with weathering detail. Published August 2025.

models.name: Quaternius City Kit (Industrial)
models.author: Quaternius
models.detail: 25 assets including potential utility infrastructure. Industrial-themed city elements.

models.name: Power Line Pack
models.author: CGMeller
models.detail: PBR game-ready power line pack. Made for real UE4 game project.

best_traffic_light.detail_notes: Vertical 3-head signal (red/yellow/green lights with hoods), minimal pole base. 148 triangles. Standard North American traffic light design.

best_power_line.model: Electrical Powerline Pole (Free Asset) by tiedtke
best_power_line.detail_notes: Wooden pole with crossarm and insulator mounts. Fully textured. Designed for array modifiers to create power line runs. Blender-native, exportable to glTF/GLB.

firewall_verdict.finding: All external 3D asset sources (Sketchfab, poly.pizza, kenney.nl) are unreachable from this container due to network firewall restrictions. This is consistent with Phase 5 historical notes ('kenney.nl firewalled').
firewall_verdict.implication: PROCEDURAL GENERATION REQUIRED: Traffic lights and power lines must be built procedurally from the reference descriptions documented above. No real model imports available in this build context.

reference_specs.traffic_lights: Vertical hooded signal head (red/yellow/green LEDs, ~148 tri target), mounted on simple pole. North American standard design.
reference_specs.power_lines: Wooden/concrete utility pole (~50-100 tri target) with crossarm, ceramic/glass insulators, wire mount points. Repeatable via spline modifier or manual instancing.
